race.description: Gala Tavern - Wilma Mcleod Memorial Hcp (C2)
race.comment: JAYASHREE (1) finished over the top from midfield to get the job done as the $2 favourite last time out. She steps up in distance again today which can see her improve again third-up into the campaign. Should get every chance from the draw and with further improvement expected, she makes plenty of appeal. RELIABLE IMAGE (4) wasn't far behind JAYASHREE last time out and is another who is better suited to this trip today. It wouldn't surprise to see her sit closer this time around and she is a winner at this track and trip previously. Can put her best foot forward. HOT AFFAIR (8) is building nicely and still presents with plenty of upside being a lightly raced 3YO. The draw is tricky, but her effort two back stacks up and she's not to be discounted. BONDI'S SON (5) is some query at the trip but has to come into calculations on recent efforts. MYSTICAL WISDOM (3) won't be far away.
